task_scope.audit_object: All departments annual expense vs. budget
task_scope.requested_deliverable: Over-budget departments with record-level classification (exempt vs. violation)

policy_questions.description: 各部门应在年度预算额度内发生费用
部门费用累计使用达到年度预算额度1.0倍后,原则上不得继续报销
因监管要求、客户服务或经营连续性确需超预算支出的,应履行专项审批(special_approval)

data_questions: For each over-budget department, what are all reimbursement records in 2025?
evidence_requirements: summarize_department_budgets for all departments (approved and all statuses)
list_expenses for each over-budget department (full year 2025)
Policy doc for budget management rules
execution_steps: 1. Get all department budgets via summarize_department_budgets
3. For each over-budget department, list all 2025 expenses
4. Classify records: special_approval=true → exempt; otherwise → violation
5. Save detailed analysis and compact summary

reasons: Aggregation, grouping, batch filtering (department-level budget comparison)
Two business rules (budget cap + special approval exemption)
Thresholds, exemptions, exceptions (1.0× threshold, special_approval exemption)
complexity.subagent_plan: None — task explicitly prohibits subagent creation

stopping_conditions: Each record classified as exempt or violation
